evidence_items.summary: Official NETGEAR KB article describes TFTP recovery procedure applicable to R7000.
evidence_items.limitations: Official guidance exists but local lab testing failed to reproduce consistent successful TFTP recovery; timing appears highly sensitive.

evidence_items.summary: Lab observation shows TTL=100 is visible but manual TFTP PUT times out; nmrpflash tool succeeds easily.
evidence_items.limitations: Observed only on specific hardware/firmware versions; scope unknown.

missing_proof: consistent reproducible TFTP recovery procedure with clear timing guidance
model-specific recovery entry method and LED indicators
recovery IP address and client IP requirements
firmware file type and upload requirements
hardware revision and firmware version applicability scope
official documentation confirming NMRP support before NMRP can be represented as a suspected official workflow
conflicting_evidence: Official TFTP guidance exists but manual lab testing fails to reproduce consistent success; NMRP works easily but no official confirmation of support.
recommended_next_step: Blocked per incident; do not proceed to profile creation until TFTP recovery is consistently reproduced in lab testing or official NMRP documentation is found.
collector_notes: Blocked hypothesis per lab incident; R7000 has official TFTP recovery documentation but manual recovery is highly timing-sensitive and unreliable in testing. NMRP appears useful as tool context only and is not represented as an official suspected workflow.

missing_proof: official NETGEAR documentation confirming recovery method
model-specific recovery entry method and LED indicators
whether TFTP or NMRP recovery is supported
recovery IP address and client IP requirements
firmware file type and upload requirements
post-upload behavior and recovery verification steps
hardware revision and firmware version applicability scope
recommended_next_step: Research official NETGEAR documentation and high-quality community sources to confirm R7800 recovery behavior, paying attention to timing sensitivity similar to R7000.
collector_notes: Research seed only; R7800 is part of the NETGEAR Nighthawk AC family similar to R7000. No workflow is asserted until model-specific evidence is found.

missing_proof: official NETGEAR documentation confirming recovery method
model-specific recovery entry method and LED indicators
whether TFTP, NMRP, or web recovery is supported
recovery IP address and client IP requirements
firmware file type and upload requirements
post-upload behavior and recovery verification steps
hardware revision and firmware version applicability scope
recommended_next_step: Research official NETGEAR documentation and high-quality community sources to confirm RAX50 recovery behavior, aligned with the RAX40 reference device once recovery evidence is available for that model.
collector_notes: Research seed only; RAX50 is a modern NETGEAR Nighthawk AX model similar to RAX40 reference device which currently only has management baseline evidence, no recovery evidence. No recovery behavior is asserted here.
